details: On npm install, the preinstall hook automatically runs index.js, which collects system information (hostname, OS type/release, architecture, home directory, username with uid/gid/shell, total/free memory, CPU count) and executes the whoami and id shell commands. All collected data is exfiltrated via HTTPS POST to 1mopc72u2pqhsphbd3rmzirm9df43wrl[.]oastify[.]com/detox56. The package has no repository, no meaningful description, and ships a decoy Instagram data file ("i") alongside the malicious payload. Package int_sezzle_sfra is a combosquat on Sezzle (a real fintech company). Its preinstall script (node index.js) automatically collects detailed system information — hostname, platform, architecture, home directory, username, uid, gid, shell, OS type/release, total/free memory, CPU count — and runs the `whoami` and `id` shell commands. All this data is POSTed as JSON to the attacker-controlled OAST callback URL hxxps://1mopc72u2pqhsphbd3rmzirm9df43wrl[.]oastify[.]com/detox56. The package has no legitimate purpose, no repository, and is a system recon and data exfiltration payload.
